Product.Title: Casio, GA-V01-1AER, G-SHOCK, 49.1×58.2×19.6mm, Watches
Product.DeliveryInfo: 5-7 business days, up to 10 business days during promotions
Product.Description:
The GA-V01 features an exterior with an organic form bringing together components with sharply defined edges, combined with a large, full-screen LCD topped by a metallic dial with openwork and employing the Shock Release Hand, among other features.
With its strikingly innovative and original design concept, the GA-V01 exudes G-SHOCK toughness, restoring the brand's never-ending spirit of challenge and commitment to delivering strength. Casio has developed a magnetic holding structure, a design where the hands, which are vulnerable to impact, are not directly fixed to the shaft but are attached using magnetic force.
This magnetic attachment allows the Shock Release Hand (minute hand) to absorb and dissipate impacts effectively. This new technology also makes it possible to create larger hands and offers more flexibility in styling. Note: Because the structure uses magnetic attachment, the minute hand may shake due to impact or vibration.
Additionally, immediately after an impact or vibration, the minute hand may temporarily shift out of position, but it will return to the correct position within a few minutes.

Product.Title: Perrelet, A4064/A, COSC, Double Rotor Turbine Evo, Ø44mm, Watches
Product.DeliveryInfo: 5-7 business days, up to 10 business days during promotions
Product.Description: Знаменитая коллекция Turbine празднует свое 10-летие в 2019 году. Чтобы отметить эту важную веху, Perrelet выпускает Turbine Evo с полностью переработанным дизайном и новым механизмом с индикацией часов, минут и секунд. Название Turbine Evo прекрасно отображает дух новых часов. «Evo» взято из слова «эволюция» и относится к эволюции часов с их модернизированными и улучшенными характеристиками, адаптированными к современному образу жизни динамичных мужчин. Turbine Evo представлены в новом спортивном корпусе с недавно разработанным автоматическим механизмом.

Product.Title: Perrelet, A4065/2, Turbine Carbon Midnight Blue, Ø44mm, Watches
Product.DeliveryInfo: 5-7 business days, up to 10 business days during promotions
Product.Description:
Perrelet представляет две новые карбоновые модели «Turbine Carbon Midnight Blue» и «Turbine Carbon Forest Green», созданные для мужчин, которые любят подчеркивать свою индивидуальность уникальным и необычным стилем и уделяют много внимания аксессуарам, дополняющим его образ.
Обе новинки имеют круглый высокотехнологичный корпус диаметром 44 мм, водонепроницаемый до 10 атм, корпус выполнен из поликарбоната и углепластика. Два суперлегких материала, которые делают его очень удобным на запястье. Кроме того, не будем забывать, что углеродное волокно обладает теплоизоляционными возможностями, оно устойчиво к перепадам температур и химическим реагентам.
Безель и задняя крышка выполнены из матовой стали с черным PVD-покрытием. Ремешок на корпусе имеет традиционное вертикальное ребристое украшение с выступающей короной, которое было представлено в линейке Turbine EVO в 2019 году для лучшего сцепления и управляемости.

Product.Title: Seiko, SPB381J1, Prospex. 1968 Diver’s Modern Re-interpretation GMT, Ø42mm, Watches
Product.DeliveryInfo: 5-7 business days, up to 10 business days during promotions
Product.Description:
Ever since its first diver’s watch in 1965, Seiko has developed new technologies, features and designs that have made the Seiko Prospex diver’s watch collection a favorite among professional and recreational divers the world over. Through more than a half-century of innovation, Seiko has continuously pushed back the boundaries of where sports watches, and diver’s watches in particular, can go and how they can be used. Continuous enhancements over the decades in safety, reliability, legibility, and ease of use have made Seiko a leader in diver’s watches.
Seiko is introducing a new movement in the long-trusted 6R family that has a GMT function and a power reserve extended to a full 72 hours. Caliber 6R54 is presented in three new Prospex creations that are all modern re-interpretations of a Seiko classic from 1968 and are designed for diving with 200-meter water resistance.
The GMT hand can be set independently in one-hour increments without interrupting the time-of-day hands and allows the wearer to see, at a glance, the time in a second time zone. Each new watch adds the GMT hand while incorporating 200 meters of water resistance, a highly legible Lumibrite-equipped dial, and a unidirectional bezel in scratch-resistant ceramic. And the automatic mechanical movement runs for three full days when fully wound.
While the watch’s design reflects its heritage, every aspect of this new creation is fully up to date in specification and execution. The case design is inherited from the 1968 original, and the case sides are mirror finished. The edge of the unidirectionally rotating bezel offers easy control.
The watch has a stainless steel case with super-hard coating and appears on a new three-link stainless steel bracelet that has a slim profile that allows it to sit securely and comfortably on the wrist.
